mapper.sql: id, material_scene, audit_subject_id, has_draft, audit_status, draft_material_json_str, material_json_str, uap_unique_id, reject_reason, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_material (material_scene, audit_subject_id, has_draft, audit_status, draft_material_json_str, material_json_str, uap_unique_id, reject_reason, created_time, updated_time) VALUES (#{materialScene}, #{auditSubjectId}, #{hasDraft}, #{auditStatus}, #{draftMaterialJsonStr}, #{materialJsonStr}, #{uapUniqueId}, #{rejectReason}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_material SET has_draft = #{hasDraft}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, draft_material_json_str = #{draftMaterialJsonStr}, material_json_str = #{materialJsonStr}, uap_unique_id = #{uapUniqueId}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, updated_time = #{updatedTime} WHERE id = #{id}
